name: RDB Alpha
postStartCommand:
for i in $(seq 1 600); do
  if [ -d .freeCodeCamp ]; then
    echo 'Found .freeCodeCamp, installing dependencies...'
    cd .freeCodeCamp && npm install
    echo 'npm install finished.'
    break
  else
    echo "Waiting for .freeCodeCamp ($i/600)"
  fi
  sleep 1
done &&
echo 'Starting PostgreSQL...' &&
sudo service postgresql start &&
echo 'Waiting a few seconds...' &&
sleep 3 &&
echo 'Creating user freecodecamp...' &&
sudo -u postgres psql -c "CREATE USER freecodecamp CREATEDB;" 2>/dev/null || true &&
echo 'Creating database freecodecamp...' &&
sudo -u postgres psql -c "CREATE DATABASE freecodecamp OWNER freecodecamp;" 2>/dev/null || true &&
echo 'PostgreSQL initialized.'
